name: Memory Architecture Layout
description: Full-stage PTO memory architecture shell for 910B/950 diagrams. It composes the shared AIC/AIV internal renderers, chip-level memory rails, detail rows, hover tips, and an SVG overlay for MTE/CV shared routes.

visualContract: .tmp/cann950_extracts/面向新一代硬件，CANN技术架构的变与不变.pdf.txt

useWhen: building full-chip memory hierarchy diagrams that sit above AIC/AIV detail views
showing Global Memory and L2 Cache rails feeding AIV and AIC objects
illustrating a 910B Vector baseline and 950-specific direct CV lanes without copying business-page HTML
allowedOverrides: preset rails, core membership, titles, route list, and route labels
choosing which shared AIC/AIV presets are mounted into each core slot
container framing outside the pattern root
forbiddenOverrides: copying generated AIC/AIV DOM into a new page instead of calling the shared renderers
hand-tuning route geometry in page-local CSS
changing chip-level rail widths, route label treatment, or AIC/AIV internal chrome outside the shared patterns
agentReuseRule: Read this JSON first. For a new 910B/950 architecture page, load aic-core-object and aiv-core-object first, then call memory-architecture/pattern.js to mount the full-stage shell. Extend presets, detail rows, and route data in pattern.js instead of cloning the rendered DOM.
